summary: Attendance Marking Bug Fix - VERIFIED WORKING. Bug was: after marking attendance via the modal in the employee data table, the change was not reflected in the UI without manual refresh. Fix: Added 'today_attendance' display in the Status column with color-coded badges.

issues: Minor: Console warnings about HTML structure (span inside tbody) - does not affect functionality

passed_tests: POST /api/hr/employees/{id}/attendance - marks attendance correctly for all statuses
GET /api/hr/employees - returns today_attendance field with correct status
Attendance modal opens with employee info, date picker, and status dropdown
Attendance submission triggers toast notification and fetchEmployees()
Today attendance badge updates IMMEDIATELY without page refresh
Badge only displays for active employees (is_active=true)
Employee data table displays correctly with all columns
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified: The attendance marking feature now updates the UI immediately without requiring a manual page refresh. The 'today_attendance' field is returned by GET /api/hr/employees endpoint (lines 1477-1483 in server.py) and displayed in the Status column with color-coded badges (AdminPage.jsx lines 551-586 and 1163-1198). The handleMarkAttendance function (lines 336-351) calls fetchEmployees() after successful attendance submission, which triggers the re-render with updated data.

bug_verification.original_bug: After marking attendance via the modal in the employee data table, the change was not reflected in the UI - manual refresh was required
bug_verification.root_cause: The 'today_attendance' field was being returned by the backend but was not being displayed in the employee table Status column
bug_verification.fix_applied: Added 'today_attendance' badge display in Status column with color-coded badges for each status (present, absent, half_day, late, on_leave)
bug_verification.verification_method: Playwright UI test confirmed: 1) Click attendance button 2) Select status 3) Submit 4) Verify badge updates immediately without refresh
bug_verification.test_result: PASS - Badge shows correct status immediately after submission

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/hr/employees - employee list with today_attendance field
frontend_components_verified: AdminPage.jsx - today_attendance badge in embedded view (lines 551-586)
AdminPage.jsx - today_attendance badge in full page view (lines 1163-1198)
